name: Six Labs
description: Industrial design venture: 3D printing and metal part machining.
highlights: Entrepreneurship applying design and fabrication to real-world parts and prototypes.
3D printing for rapid iteration; current focus on machining metal components.

name: Clino
description: Mobile platform for home cleaning, elderly care, and childcare services.
highlights: Domain: domestic and care services — scheduling and role-specific flows for workers and clients.
Two published Android apps on Google Play; Go API with PostgreSQL and Redis.
End-to-end product delivery from backend contracts to mobile UX.

name: Candra
highlights: Domain: fishing-industry operations — entities, production, and reporting workflows.
Next.js admin UI over a Go backend and PostgreSQL data model.
Clear API boundaries between operational UI and backend services.
